_README: WorldState obstacle template for Phase 3. The obstacle components below register through the erh:vmodutils module and present on the API as grippers, so they show up in resource_names as grippers. Add them to the `components` array of your machine (or the imported fragment). Replace every REPLACE_WITH_MEASURED value by measuring your own workspace (sample positions with GetEndPosition over the real table). Pose z is the CENTER of the box: half its height. The table sits below world z=0, so its z is negative half-thickness. The safety walls are thin vertical boxes at the workspace boundary — size and place them to fence the arm away from people and equipment. They are a real safety feature and a demo of the motion planner honoring configured obstacles for production deployments.
